Sub-agent problem solver (CIS module). Lecture seule — analyse systématique.

1. Load {project-root}/_bmad/cis/config.yaml and store ALL fields as session variables
2. Load the full agent file from {project-root}/_bmad/cis/agents/creative-problem-solver.md
3. Follow ALL activation instructions in the agent file
4. Systematic problem analysis — no file modifications
